2605.20357.title: Consistently Informative Soft-Label Temperature for Knowledge Distillation
2605.20357.paper_summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers knowledge from a high-capacity teacher to a compact student by matching their predictive distributions, with temperature scaling serving as a central mechanism for smoothing teacher predictions and exposing informative "dark knowledge" beyond the hard label. However, the standard fixed-temperature design is inherently sample-agnostic. Since samples differ in logit scale and learning difficulty, a single global temperature produces teacher soft labels with highly inconsistent entropy: some predictions remain overly sharp and provide limited inter-class information, whereas others become over-smoothed and lose class-discriminative information. Moreover, sharing the same temperature between teacher and student further imposes rigid logit-scale alignment despite their capacity mismatch. To address these limitations, we propose CIST (Consistently Informative Soft-label Temperature), which assigns separate sample-wise adaptive temperatures to the teacher and student. This design produces consistently informative teacher soft labels while relaxing rigid teacher--student logit-scale matching. It also reweights the distillation objective according to teacher confidence and student learning difficulty. Theoretically, we show that teacher-label entropy is largely governed by the ratio between the maximum teacher logit and the temperature, providing a principled basis for adaptive smoothing. Empirically, CIST mitigates the inconsistency induced by fixed temperature, and experiments on both vision and language distillation tasks show consistent improvements over standard KD and strong baselines with negligible computational overhead.
2605.20357.paper_summary_zh: 知識蒸餾（KD）通過匹配高容量教師和緊湊學生的預測分佈來轉移知識，溫度縮放作為平滑教師預測和揭示超越硬標籤的資訊性「黑暗知識」的核心機制。然而，標準的固定溫度設計本質上是樣本無關的。由於樣本在邏輯尺度和學習難度上有所不同，單一的全局溫度會產生具有高度不一致熵的教師軟標籤：某些預測保持過於尖銳，提供有限的類間信息，而其他預測則過度平滑，失去類別區分信息。此外，教師和學生之間共享相同的溫度進一步強加了剛性的邏輯尺度對齊，儘管它們的能力不匹配。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了CIST（持續資訊性軟標籤溫度），它為教師和學生分配單獨的樣本自適應溫度。這種設計產生了一致的資訊性教師軟標籤，同時放鬆了剛性的教師-學生邏輯尺度匹配。它還根據教師信心和學生學習難度重新加權蒸餾目標。在理論上，我們表明教師標籤熵主要受最大教師邏輯與溫度之比的影響，為自適應平滑提供了原則基礎。在實證上，CIST減輕了固定溫度引起的不一致性，並且在視覺和語言蒸餾任務上的實驗顯示出相對於標準KD和強基準的一致性改進，且計算開銷微不足道。
2605.20357.author: Hoang-Chau Luong et.al.
2605.20357.authors: Hoang-Chau Luong, Nghia Van Vo, Kaiqi Zhao, Lingwei Chen
